prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、湖北省物理类考生小幅增加以及声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年该校在湖北物理类录取位次将继续后移。在2025年基准23168名基础上，预测最低位次约23518名，区间23018–24018名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 16774 → 17372 → 18473 → 21511 → 23168, showing a continuous decline for 5 consecutive years, with an accelerated decline of about 4695 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 23168; the enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province for Physics Category was 71 in 2021, 72 in 2022, 74 in 2023, 77 in 2024, and 82 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 82, the same as 2025, with expansion paused, and competitive pressure not alleviated by the increase in plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is about 92nd, with recent rankings fluctuating between 86 and 92, overall stable in the middle of the national top 100, belonging to regional key normal universities; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving a teacher ethics incident where a professor from the School of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 100th, rated as average, with medium to low exposure on short video platforms; no obvious filing gaps were recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, with most other disciplines concentrated at B+ and below; Foreign Language and Literature majors in Physics Category have lower rankings (about 23168 in 2025), and the pulling effect of advantageous disciplines on overall admission rankings is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors in Physics Category such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to have high social popularity (recommended and highly recommended in 2024 respectively), but the popularity of Computer Science has significantly cooled compared to 2023; normal/education majors show a differentiated wait-and-see attitude; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 251,200, a slight increase from 249,802 in 2025, expanding the competition base; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, a neighboring province, geographically close to Hubei with convenient transportation, offering some regional attraction to Hubei candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Hubei is moderate (82 for Physics Category), making it one of the larger-scale institutions among out-of-province enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Hubei, and a somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the admission ranking for this university in Hubei Physics Category in 2026 will continue to decline. Based on the 2025 baseline of 23168, the predicted minimum ranking is about 23518, with a range of 23018 to 24018.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23018 to 24018, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 23000), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Technology, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics; if the ranking is close to the upper limit, prioritize Tier 2 majors with good employment prospects such as Communication Engineering and Statistics, and use Tier 3 majors like Clinical Medicine and Foreign Language and Literature (A- discipline) as stable choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3300 → 3353 → 3561 → 3884 → 4070, showing a continuous decline over 5 years, with a cumulative decline of about 770 places in the last 3 years, indicating a stable downward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4070; the enrollment plan for this university in Hubei for History Category was 42 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 50 in 2024, and 45 in 2025, showing an initial expansion followed by contraction; the 2026 plan is 45, unchanged from 2025, with a stable plan that does not provide additional relief to competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is about 92nd in 2026, with slight fluctuations between 86 and 92 in recent years, overall stable in the middle tier of the national top 100, belonging to a regional key normal university; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving a professor from the College of Arts publicly humiliating a student seeking help, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology; its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 100th, rated as average, with medium to low exposure on short video platforms; no obvious enrollment gaps were recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; the Foreign Language and Literature category has a medium ranking in History Category admissions (about 3911 in 2025), and the advantageous discipline provides some support to the overall admission ranking but with limited pull.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors shows a differentiated wait-and-see attitude, with traditional liberal arts normal majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and History having stable application popularity; the social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors is clearly discouraged; Law popularity is differentiated and wait-and-see; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Hubei for 2026 is about 142,500, a slight increase from 141,436 in 2025, with a small expansion of the competition base; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, a neighboring province, geographically close to Hubei with convenient transportation, providing some regional attraction for Hubei candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Hubei for History Category is 45, which is a moderate scale among out-of-province admissions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight increase in History Category candidates in Hubei, and the somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the admission ranking for this university in Hubei's History Category in 2026 will continue to decline slightly. Based on the 2025 baseline of 4070, the predicted minimum ranking is about 4150, with a range of 3650–4650.
